mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, author, category, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT id, title, content, author, category, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, title, content, author, category, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
